✓ GLOB-01✓ Intent Recog· GLOB-19✓ GenUC-24✓ GenUC-01✓ GenUC-05✓ GenUC-08✓ BC-02✓ BC-02 branch✓ BCInvol-00✓ BCInvol-02✓ BC-03✓ BCInvol-03· BCInvol-05· BCInvol-05b· GLOB-16✓ GLOB-11✓ DBaaS/SP
⚠️ Gap analysis vs Miro 
✅ No divergences detected against the Miro flow (heuristic — confirm against the canvas).
💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


DISRUPTION NOTIFICATION (SYSTEM-INITIATED)


⚙️ The booking is AC 301 YYZ→YVR on 25-Jun-2026


⚙️ AC 301 has been CANCELLED by the airline


⚙️ Generates a disruption notification


⚙️ SMS/email sent to Ahmed with deeplink to agentic chatbot


⚙️ Deeplink contains: PNR, passenger identity token, disruption context


PROACTIVE DEEPLINK ENTRY (BCInvol-00)


Ahmed clicks the deeplink from the notification
👤


🤖
Opens with disruption context pre-loaded


🤖
Hello! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?


Selects English
👤


🤖
Privacy alert displayed


🤖
Recognizes invol intent automatically from deeplink context


My flight was cancelled
👤


LEGAL DISCLAIMER (GenUC-24)


🤖
Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process. To process your request, you'll need your booking reference and the full name associated to the booking. Depending on the changes you select, payment may be required. Please have access to your preferred method of payment. Would you like to get started?


Ahmed accepts the disclaimer
👤


IDENTIFICATION (GenUC-01) — PRE-POPULATED FROM DEEPLINK


🤖
Pre-populates passenger name and PNR from deeplink token


🤖
I can see your booking reference DL4R8K for Ahmed Khalil. Let me verify your identity.


⚙️ Trip Tracer returns: PNR FOUND


AUTHENTICATION (BC-01) — AUTO-AUTHENTICATED VIA DEEPLINK


BC-01 checks: Is user authenticated? → YES (deeplink token provides authentication)
👤


GenUC-05 (OTP flow) is skipped entirely
👤


No OTP code is sent
👤


🤖
No verification prompt is displayed


JOURNEY SELECTION (GenUC-08)


🤖
Just to confirm the details of your booking: • Flight: AC 301 • Route: Toronto (YYZ) → Vancouver (YVR) • Date: June 25, 2026 • Status: CANCELLED Is this correct?


Yes
👤


ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02 INVOL)


⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE


⚙️ ES detects: flight CANCELLED (disruption signal)


⚙️ ES returns: triggerType=INVOLUNTARY


⚙️ Acknowledge.isEligible=true, change.isEligible=true, involuntaryRefund.isEligible=true


ACKNOWLEDGEMENT (BCInvol-02)


🤖
Thank you, I'm sorry to hear your journey hasn't gone according to plan. Let me help you with your flight disruption.


🤖
BC-03: old (CANCELLED) + new itinerary cards displayed (if rebooked)


OPTIONS (BCInvol-03)


🤖
Please note that any Ancillary services that you had on your ticket may no longer be associated to your ticket. Any paid services that are no longer applied will be refunded.


🤖
How would you like to proceed?


• Confirm proposed itinerary


• Select a new flight


• Cancel my booking


Confirm proposed itinerary
👤


FINAL CONFIRMATION (BCInvol-07)


⚙️ DBaaS sends involuntary_acknowledge to EIP Self-Reacc API


⚙️ EIP returns success


🤖
Your ticket has been re-issued. You should receive an email confirmation shortly.


🤖
UPDATED flight card displayed


END FLOW (GLOB-11)


🤖
Is there anything else I can help you with?


No
👤


🤖
Thank you for choosing Air Canada.


✅ Expected results from test case

PNR: DL4R8K
Flight: AC 301 YYZ→YVR, 25-Jun-2026 (CANCELLED)
Disruption notification sent via SMS/email with deeplink
User clicks deeplink (proactive trigger, NOT reactive chat)

CONVERSATION ENTRY (GLOB-01)


⚙️ The booking is AC 301 YYZ→YVR on 26-Jun-2026


⚙️ Segment status: UC (Unable to Confirm) — airline could not confirm the seat


⚙️ Disruption occurred >30 min ago


⚙️ Booking source: ACB · 014-stock ticket · Flex fare


⚙️ No blocking SSRs · not ACV · not group


🤖
Hello! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?


Selects English
👤


🤖
Privacy alert displayed


🤖
How can I help you today?


My flight seat wasn't confirmed, I need help.
👤


🤖
Identifies involuntary booking change intent


LEGAL DISCLAIMER (GenUC-24)


🤖
Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process. To process your request, you'll need your booking reference and the full name associated to the booking. Depending on the changes you select, payment may be required. Please have access to your preferred method of payment. Would you like to get started?


Anna accepts the disclaimer
👤


IDENTIFICATION (GenUC-01)


🤖
I can definitely help you with that. To start I'll just need to know some information to be able to process your request and identify you.


🤖
Please provide your full name exactly as it appears on your ticket, including any middle names if applicable.


Anna Berg
👤


🤖
Thanks, Anna! And, what is your booking reference number?


UC7R3K
👤


⚙️ Trip Tracer returns: PNR FOUND


AUTHENTICATION (BC-01 → GenUC-05)


🤖
BC-01: not authenticated → GenUC-05


🤖
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll do this by sending a one-time verification code to either your email or phone number on file. Where would you like to receive it?


• Email: a***@gmail.com


• Phone: +1***329


Email: a***@gmail.com
👤


🤖
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it.


739214
👤


🤖
Your verification was successful. Let's proceed to the next step.


JOURNEY SELECTION (GenUC-08)


🤖
Just to confirm the details of your booking: • Flight: AC 301 • Route: Toronto (YYZ) → Vancouver (YVR) • Date: June 26, 2026 • Status: Unable to Confirm Is this correct?


Yes
👤


ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02 INVOL) — STATUS UC


⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE


🤖
Rule A: segment status = UC (Unable to Confirm)


🤖
UC is one of the 8 disrupted statuses in Rule A: [UN, UC, HX, SC, TK, NO, WL, DL]


🤖
Disruption >30 min → eligible for self-reacc


⚙️ ES returns: triggerType=INVOLUNTARY


⚙️ Acknowledge.isEligible=true, change.isEligible=true


ACKNOWLEDGEMENT (BCInvol-02)


🤖
Thank you, I'm sorry to hear your journey hasn't gone according to plan. Let me help you with your flight disruption.


🤖
BC-03: disrupted flight details displayed


OPTIONS (BCInvol-03)


🤖
How would you like to proceed?


• Confirm proposed itinerary (if rebooked)


• Select a new flight


• Cancel my booking


Select a new flight
👤


SSR & BAGGAGE CHECK (BCInvol-04a/b)


🤖
Checks SSRs → no blocking SSRs → PASS


🤖
Checks baggage → no checked bag → PASS


FLIGHT SELECTION (BCInvol-05a)


⚙️ Calls EIP Self-Reacc API for alternative flights


⚙️ Up to 5 alternatives displayed


Anna selects an alternative flight
👤


FINAL CONFIRMATION (BCInvol-07)


⚙️ DBaaS sends involuntary_confirm_alternate_offer to EIP


⚙️ EIP returns success


🤖
Your ticket has been re-issued. You should receive an email confirmation shortly.


🤖
UPDATED flight card displayed


END FLOW (GLOB-11)


🤖
Is there anything else I can help you with?


No
👤


🤖
Thank you for choosing Air Canada.

🤖
Just to confirm the details of your booking: • Flight: AC 873 (rebooked from AC 871) • Route: Toronto (YYZ) → London (LHR) • Date: June 27, 2026 • Original: Business class • Current: Economy class Is this correct?


Yes
👤


ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02 INVOL) — DOWNGRADE DETECTED


⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE


🤖
Flight CANCELLED → disruption detected


🤖
Rule D: reprotected cabin (Economy/Y) < original cabin (Business/J) → DOWNGRADE DETECTED


⚙️ ES returns: triggerType=INVOLUNTARY


⚙️ Acknowledge.isEligible=true, change.isEligible=true, involuntaryRefund.isEligible=true


⚙️ Downgrade flag set: isDowngrade=true


ACKNOWLEDGEMENT (BCInvol-02) — DOWNGRADE MESSAGING


🤖
Thank you, I'm sorry to hear your journey hasn't gone according to plan. Let me help you with your flight disruption.


🤖
BC-03: old itinerary (AC 871, Business) + new itinerary (AC 873, Economy) displayed


Displays a message indicating the passenger has been rebooked to a lower cabin class (Business → Economy) and that the cabin difference may be eligible for a refund or compensation
👤


OPTIONS (BCInvol-03)


🤖
Please note that any Ancillary services that you had on your ticket may no longer be associated to your ticket. Any paid services that are no longer applied will be refunded.


🤖
How would you like to proceed?


• Confirm proposed itinerary (accept Economy rebook)


• Select a new flight (search for Business class alternatives)


• Cancel my booking


Select a new flight
👤


SSR & BAGGAGE CHECK (BCInvol-04a/b)


🤖
Checks SSRs → no blocking SSRs → PASS


🤖
Checks baggage → no checked bag → PASS


FLIGHT SELECTION (BCInvol-05a)


⚙️ Calls EIP Self-Reacc API for alternative flights


⚙️ Alternatives may include Business class options (same cabin as original)


⚙️ Up to 5 alternatives displayed


Marcus selects AC 875 YYZ→LHR, 27-Jun-2026, Business class
👤


FINAL CONFIRMATION (BCInvol-07)


⚙️ DBaaS sends involuntary_confirm_alternate_offer to EIP


⚙️ EIP returns success


⚙️ Downgrade resolved — passenger back in Business class


🤖
Your ticket has been re-issued. You should receive an email confirmation shortly.


🤖
UPDATED flight card displayed (AC 875, Business)

No
👤

✓ asserted · ✗ required-by-Miro but missing · · not applicable
✗ GLOB-01✓ Intent Recog· GLOB-19✗ GenUC-24✗ GenUC-01✗ GenUC-05✗ GenUC-08✗ BC-02· BC-02 branch· BCInvol-00· BCInvol-02· BC-03· BCInvol-03✓ BCInvol-05· BCInvol-05b· GLOB-16✗ GLOB-11✓ DBaaS/SP
⚠️ Gap analysis vs Miro 
✅ No divergences detected against the Miro flow (heuristic — confirm against the canvas).
💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


API REQUEST — INVOLUNTARY SEARCH ALTERNATIVE


🤖
Headers: Authorization: Bearer <valid-jwt>, x-agentic-session-id: <valid-session>


🤖
Intent involuntarySearchAlternative sessionId sess-search-001 arguments orderId X7K9M2 lastName Doe searchDate 2026-06-28 departurePreference morning


SP VALIDATION


⚙️ SP validates JWT token → VALID


⚙️ SP validates request payload structure → VALID


⚙️ SP identifies intent = involuntarySearchAlternative → maps to Invol API


SP ROUTING TO INVOL API


⚙️ SP Router forwards request to Invol API


⚙️ InvolResume Lambda is invoked


⚙️ Lambda reads DynamoDB session for sess-search-001


⚙️ Lambda validates intent involuntarySearchAlternative is in NextActions


⚙️ Lambda calls SendTaskSuccess on SF with search parameters


⚙️ SF transitions to search_alternative state


⚙️ SF calls EIP Self-Reacc API to search for alternatives


SP RESPONSE


🤖
Status success sessionId sess-search-001 state involuntary_search_alternative data alternatives nextActions involuntarySearchAlternative involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer


⚙️ DynamoDB session updated: state=SEARCH_COMPLETE, alternatives cached


✅ Expected results from test case








📋 Test data / preconditions
Direct API call to SP booking-change endpoint
Intent: involuntarySearchAlternative
Active session: sess-search-001 · State: ACKNOWLEDGED
SF execution waiting at search_alternative callback
Search arguments: new date, departure/arrival preferences
I-91POSITIVESP Routes involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer Intent Correctlyaligned▾
  SP Routes involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer Intent Correctly
invol route

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


API REQUEST — INVOLUNTARY CONFIRM ALTERNATE OFFER


🤖
Headers: Authorization: Bearer <valid-jwt>, x-agentic-session-id: <valid-session>


🤖
Intent involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer sessionId sess-confirm-001 arguments orderId X7K9M2 lastName Doe selectedAlternativeId alt-flight-003


SP VALIDATION


⚙️ SP validates JWT token → VALID


⚙️ SP validates request payload structure → VALID


⚙️ SP identifies intent = involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer → maps to Invol API


SP ROUTING TO INVOL API


⚙️ SP Router forwards request to Invol API


⚙️ InvolResume Lambda is invoked


⚙️ Lambda reads DynamoDB session for sess-confirm-001


⚙️ Lambda validates intent involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer is in NextActions


⚙️ Lambda calls SendTaskSuccess on SF with selectedAlternativeId


⚙️ SF transitions to confirm_alternate state


⚙️ SF calls EIP Self-Reacc API to confirm the selected alternative


⚙️ EIP processes rebooking and ticket reissue


SP RESPONSE


🤖
Status success sessionId sess-confirm-001 state involuntary_confirm_alternate_offer data confirmationStatus CONFIRMED newItinerary nextActions involuntary_end


⚙️ DynamoDB session updated: state=CONFIRMED, TaskToken=null


⚙️ Kafka event published to FLIGHT-CHANGE-INVOL topic


✅ Expected results from test case









📋 Test data / preconditions
Direct API call to SP booking-change endpoint
Intent: involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer
Active session: sess-confirm-001 · State: SEARCH_COMPLETE
SF execution waiting at confirm callback
Selected alternative flight ID from previous search

API REQUEST — EXPIRED JWT


🤖
Headers: Authorization: Bearer <expired-jwt-token-issued-25h-ago>


🤖
Headers: x-agentic-session-id: <valid-session>


🤖
Intent involuntaryRetrieveOrder arguments orderId X7K9M2 lastName Doe


SP JWT VALIDATION


🤖
SP extracts JWT from Authorization header


⚙️ SP validates JWT signature → VALID signature


⚙️ SP checks JWT expiry (exp claim) → EXPIRED (issued 25h ago, TTL 24h)


⚙️ SP rejects the request at the authentication gate


SP RESPONSE — 401


🤖
Error Unauthorized message JWT token has expired code TOKEN_EXPIRED


⚙️ No downstream call to DBaaS Invol API


⚙️ No InvolStart/InvolResume Lambda invoked


⚙️ No DynamoDB session created or read


⚙️ No SF execution started


NEGATIVE VERIFICATION


🤖
CloudWatch logs show SP rejected at auth gate


⚙️ No DynamoDB write operations


⚙️ No Kafka events published


✅ Expected results from test case






📋 Test data / preconditions
Direct API call to SP booking-change endpoint
JWT token: expired (issued 25 hours ago, TTL = 24 hours)
Valid request body with involuntaryRetrieveOrder intent
Tests SP-layer authentication gate before any downstream call

Eligibility acknowledge change refund

},

Warnings

SessionId

State

Data

NextActions


🤖
Warnings

⚙️ SUCCESS

⚙️ INVOLUNTARY

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


PRECONDITION: INVOL FLOW COMPLETED


⚙️ Invol booking change for PNR KF3R7K completed successfully


⚙️ Ticket reissued via EIP


⚙️ DynamoDB session updated: status=CONFIRMED


⚙️ SF transitions to Kafka publish step


KAFKA PUBLISH — BROKER UNAVAILABLE


🤖
Lambda attempts to publish event to FLIGHT-CHANGE-INVOL topic


⚙️ Kafka broker is unavailable (connection refused)


⚙️ Publish attempt 1: FAIL (broker unreachable)


RETRY WITH BACKOFF


🤖
Retry 1: wait 1s → FAIL (broker still down)


🤖
Retry 2: wait 2s → FAIL (broker still down)


🤖
Retry 3: wait 4s → FAIL (broker still down)


🤖
Max retries exhausted


FALLBACK HANDLING


🤖
Error KAFKA_PUBLISH_FAILED sessionId sess-kf-001 PNR KF3R7K retries


🤖
Event stored in DLQ (Dead Letter Queue) or fallback store for later replay


⚙️ DynamoDB session status remains CONFIRMED (not rolled back)


⚙️ Ticket reissue is NOT reversed (EIP confirmation is final)


⚙️ Flow completion is NOT blocked by Kafka unavailability


USER EXPERIENCE


Your ticket has been re-issued. You should receive an email confirmation shortly.
👤


⚙️ Is unaware of Kafka failure (backend concern only)


✅ Expected results from test case








📋 Test data / preconditions
PNR: KF3R7K · Invol flow completed successfully (ticket reissued)
SF reaches Kafka event publish step
Kafka broker is unavailable (broker down, topic unreachable, network issue)
Tests that Kafka failure does not block flow completion

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


PRECONDITION: SF AT CONFIRM STATE


⚙️ Active session sess-eip-001 at involuntary_confirm_alternate_offer state


⚙️ SF execution waiting to call EIP for confirmation


EIP CALL — HTTP 500 ERROR


⚙️ SF Lambda calls EIP Self-Reacc API to confirm alternate offer


⚙️ Error Internal Server Error


RETRY STRATEGY — EXPONENTIAL BACKOFF


🤖
Attempt 1 (initial): EIP call → HTTP 500 → FAIL


🤖
Wait 2 seconds (backoff interval)


🤖
Attempt 2 (retry 1): EIP call → HTTP 500 → FAIL


🤖
Wait 4 seconds (2x backoff)


🤖
Attempt 3 (retry 2): EIP call → HTTP 500 → FAIL


🤖
Wait 8 seconds (2x backoff)


🤖
Attempt 4 (retry 3 — final): EIP call → HTTP 500 → FAIL


🤖
Max retries (3) exhausted → total 4 attempts, ~14 seconds elapsed


ERROR HANDLER LAMBDA INVOKED


🤖
DynamoDB updated: status=ERROR, TaskToken=null, FlowVariables=null, NextActions=null


⚙️ State CONFIRM status ERROR error EIP_500 retryCount


⚙️ SF receives SendTaskFailure


⚙️ SF transitions to error terminal state


CHATBOT ERROR MESSAGE


Displays a message indicating a temporary issue occurred and the passenger should try again later or contact Air Canada reservations
👤

Active invol session: sess-eip-001
SF at involuntary_confirm_alternate_offer state
EIP Self-Reacc API returns HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error) on every call

API REQUEST — VOLUNTARY INTENT


🤖
Headers: Authorization: Bearer <valid-jwt>, x-agentic-session-id: <valid-session>


🤖
Intent voluntaryStartSearch arguments orderId RT6Y2P lastName Chen


SP VALIDATION


⚙️ SP validates JWT token → VALID


⚙️ SP validates request payload structure → VALID


SP INTENT ROUTING — VOL vs INVOL


⚙️ SP Router identifies intent = voluntaryStartSearch


⚙️ VoluntaryStartSearch


⚙️ Known vol intents: [voluntaryStartSearch, voluntaryCreateCart, voluntaryDeeplinkVerification, voluntaryPurchaseComplete, voluntary_abandon]


⚙️ Known invol intents: [involuntaryRetrieveOrder, involuntaryAcknowledge, involuntarySearchAlternative, involuntaryConfirmAlternateOffer]


FORWARDING TO VOL API


⚙️ SP forwards request to Vol API endpoint


⚙️ VolStart Lambda is invoked (NOT InvolStart)


⚙️ DynamoDB session created in Vol table (NOT Invol table)


⚙️ Vol SF execution started (dbaas-rebooking-vol-*)


SP RESPONSE


🤖
Status success sessionId sess-vol-001 state voluntary_start_search nextActions voluntaryCreateCart


NEGATIVE VERIFICATION


🤖
No InvolStart Lambda invoked


⚙️ No Invol DDB session created


⚙️ No Invol SF execution started (dbaas-rebooking-invol-*)


✅ Expected results from test case







📋 Test data / preconditions
Direct API call to SP booking-change endpoint
Intent: voluntaryStartSearch (vol intent, not invol)
Valid JWT token · Valid payload
Tests SP cross-flow routing: vol intent received by same SP endpoint as invol
